title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Assam Rifles Act, 2006. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 20th February, 2009, vide notification No. S.O. 517(E), dated 20th February, 2009, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II sec.3(ii)
